artifacts.role: generic instance-method visibility emission for private _dispatch_request
WordPress-profile adapter plans for WP_Http deprecated transport selection
typed shell metadata for the compiler-emitted WP_Http transport adapter
WPHX PHP compile fixture for wp-includes/class-wp-http.php
WPHX-312.66 oracle/candidate manifest using the compiler-emitted original-path public shell

claims: WPHX PHP emits the original-path wp-includes/class-wp-http.php bounded WP_Http adapter for deprecated transport selection.
The WPHX-312.66 candidate no longer copies and patches a public PHP class shell for _get_first_available_transport.

PHP still owns deprecated filter timing, static transport test calls, dispatch transport caching, WP_Error construction, http_api_debug, http_response, and transport request execution while Haxe owns bounded token and class-name mapping.
non_claims: This does not claim WP_Http::request ownership, full transport dispatch ownership, or whole-file WP_Http ownership.
This does not claim live cURL/streams/Requests network I/O, DNS/proxy/TLS behavior, or installed WordPress distribution behavior.
This does not claim selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit parity or that WPHX PHP is a complete arbitrary-Haxe PHP backend.
